description: You are Rachel Torres, newly appointed VP of Digital Communications at Cascadia Media Group, a regional news network that just completed its merger with Pacific Coast Digital. Log in to Socioboard (admin@socioboard.local / Admin2024!) to restructure the company's social media operations. Update the admin profile with your name (Rachel Torres), timezone (US/Pacific), phone (+1-5039876543), and bio 'VP of Digital Communications at Cascadia Media Group. Managing integrated social media strategy across 8 newsroom desks.' Delete the three legacy teams prefixed with '[LEGACY]' but do NOT delete the operational teams 'Daily Briefing' and 'Weekend Edition'. Create seven newsroom teams: Metro Desk, State Politics, Tech & Science, Arts & Culture, Sports, Investigations, and Breaking News. Assign reporters to their beat teams: Emily Chen (emily.chen@socioboard.local) to Metro Desk, State Politics, and Investigations; Michael Okafor (michael.okafor@socioboard.local) to Tech & Science, Arts & Culture, and Breaking News; Victoria Santos (victoria.santos@socioboard.local) to State Politics, Investigations, and Breaking News. Finally, add six RSS monitoring feeds: 'World News Wire' (https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/world/rss.xml), 'Capitol Watch' (https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/politics/rss.xml), 'Tech Industry Feed' (https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/technology/rss.xml), 'Arts & Entertainment' (https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/entertainment_and_arts/rss.xml), 'Sports Wire' (https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/sport/rss.xml), and 'Breaking News Alert' (https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/rss.xml).
